sourcesContent:
import { Person, PermIdentity, LocalShippingOutlined, CalendarToday, Place, MailOutline, } from "@material-ui/icons"; import { useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux'; import "./order.css"; import {format} from 'timeago.js'; import { useState } from "react"; import { updateOrder } from "../../redux/apiCalls"; import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'; const Order = () => { const location = useLocation(); const orderId = location.pathname.split("/")[2]; const dispatch = useDispatch(); const order = useSelector((state) => state.order.orders.find(order => order._id === orderId) ); const [ status, setStatus ] = useState(''); const { t } = useTranslation(["order"]); const handleUpdateOrder = (e) => { setStatus(e.target.value) }; const handleClick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const orderToUpdate = { ...order, status }; updateOrder(orderId, orderToUpdate, dispatch) } return (

{t("title")} {order._id}

{t("personalInfo.title")}

{t("personalInfo.userId")}

{order.userId}

{t("personalInfo.userEmail")}

{order.email}

{t("personalInfo.orderStatus")}

{t("personalInfo.createdAt")}

{format(order.createdAt)}

{t("personalInfo.updatedAt")}

{format(order.updatedAt)}

{t("address.title")}

{t("address.street")}

{order.address?.line1}

{order.address?.line2}

{t("address.city")}

{order.address?.city}

{t("address.state")}

{order.address?.state}

Post Code:

{order.address?.postal_code}

Products

{order.products.map((product) => ( ))}
Product ID Product Title Color Quantity Price for 100 kg Price for Product
{product.productId} {product.title} {product.color} {product.quantity} {product.price} {product.quantity * product.price} UAH

Total Amount: {order.amount} UAH

); }; export default Order;
